title: Downsta's Building Utilities
description: A simple mod that allows you to change them style of your blocks without having to mine the up. The mod adds 4 unique tools: The File, The Chisel, The Hammer and The Press.
body:
May Have A Rework At Some Point In The Next Couple Months Or So Depending On Some Things

*Note: Both Versions Will Update Slowly As It Uses MCREATOR, But I Will Have To Wait For Both MCREATOR And The Fabric Generator To Update Before I Can Update The Fabric Version, So Please Be Patient*

It Works For Any Version Of 1.20.1 Fabric BUT For Some Reason It Won't Let You Run ANY Version Of Sodium Above 1.20.1-0.5.3. Also I Haven't Found A Version Of Iris That Works But If You Do PLEASE Tell Me

This Mod Adds 3 Tools That Allow You To Change The Style Of The Block Used On
The Added Tools Are:
- The File
  Allows you to INCREASE the SMOOTHNESS of the blocks it is used on, such as changing          Cobblestone to Stone and Deepslate to Polished Deepslate
- The Chisel
  Allows you to CHANGE the PATTERN on the block, such as changing Stone to Stone Brick and Cobbled Deepslate to Deepslate Tiles
- The Hammer
  Allows you to DECREASE the SMOOTHNESS of the blocks used on, such as turning Stone to Cobblestone and Sandstone to Sand
  A bonus of The Hammer is also that it is able to crack blocks such as Stone Bricks and Deepslate Tiles

The Tools Are Crafted With A Combination Of Iron And Copper Ingots

- The Press
  Allows you to convert broken-down blocks into a compressed version, like Gravel into Cobblestone and Sand into Sandstone
